Class LiveMeasurement

java.lang.Object
com.github.mehdishahdoost.api.model.LiveMeasurement
public class LiveMeasurement extends Object
Represents real-time measurement data from the Tibber API.

This class corresponds to the LiveMeasurement object in the Tibber GraphQL API. For more information, see: Tibber API Reference

    Description
